name: Functional - HITL Escalation for Missing Contact Email
description: Validates that RFQAgent.run escalates to HITL when contact_email is missing in rfq_json.
input: A dict with valid pipeline_run_id and rfq_json missing contact_email but containing line_items with bu_category.
output: A dict with success=False, error_code='MISSING_CONTACT_EMAIL', and escalation details.
